CustomField.formula: IF( HR_HH_Override__c = 0, "Enter household size", IF( OR(ISBLANK(IAW_Income_Limit__c),Moderate_Income_Limit__c=0,IAW_Median_Income__c=0,Low_Income_Limit__c=0), HYPERLINK( "/flow/HR_Income_Limits?varSFID="+Id+ "&varHH="+TEXT(HR_HH_Override__c)+ "&retURL="+Id ,'Click Here', '_parent'), 'COMPLETE '+HYPERLINK( "/flow/HR_Income_Limits?varSFID="+Id+ "&varHH="+TEXT(HR_HH_Override__c)+ "&retURL="+Id ,'(Click to Change)', '_parent')))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Click link to add income limit data from the municipality object. To run again, delete the income limit data and click the link again.
CustomField.label: HR Populate Income Limits
